root_text.an8.68:1.3: Adiṭṭhe adiṭṭhavāditā, asute asutavāditā, amute amutavāditā, aviññāte aviññātavāditā, diṭṭhe diṭṭhavāditā, sute sutavāditā, mute mutavāditā, viññāte viññātavāditā.

translation_text.an8.68:1.1: “Mendicants, there are these eight noble expressions.
translation_text.an8.68:1.3: Saying you haven’t seen, heard, thought, or known something, and you haven’t. And saying you’ve seen, heard, thought, or known something, and you have.
translation_text.an8.68:1.4: These are the eight noble expressions.”
